// <auto-generated by Tech-Cosmos Hub />
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using TechCosmos.CombatSystem.Runtime;
using TechCosmos.EventBus.Runtime;
using TechCosmos.InputSystem.Runtime;
using TechCosmos.TargetingSystem.Runtime;
using TechCosmos.TargetingSystem.Unity;

namespace TechCosmos.Game.Adapters
{
    public static class GameCompositionRoot
    {
        public static InputHub InputHub { get; private set; }
        public static TargetingHub TargetingHub { get; private set; }
        public static CombatHub CombatHub { get; private set; }
        public static IEventBus EventBus { get; private set; }
        public static GameEntityRegistry EntityRegistry { get; private set; }

        public static bool IsInitialized { get; private set; }

        public static void Initialize(ITargetingBackend targetingBackend = null)
        {
            if (IsInitialized) return;

            EntityRegistry = new GameEntityRegistry();
            EventBus = new global::TechCosmos.EventBus.Runtime.EventBus();
            InputHub = new InputHub();
            CombatHub = new CombatHub(EntityRegistry.CombatRegistry);

            var backend = targetingBackend ?? new UnityPhysicsTargetingBackend(handle =>
                EntityRegistry.TryGetTransform(handle, out var transform) ? transform : null);

            TargetingHub = new TargetingHub(backend);

            IsInitialized = true;
        }

        public static void Shutdown()
        {
            if (!IsInitialized) return;

            InputHub = null;
            TargetingHub = null;
            CombatHub = null;
            EventBus = null;
            EntityRegistry?.Clear();
            EntityRegistry = null;
            IsInitialized = false;
        }
    }
}
